name: telegram-support-agent
description: Local-first Telegram support analytics, drafting, and confirmed posting workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Local Telegram support analytics and confirmed reply workflows.
interface.longDescription: Indexes one configured Telegram support chat and public resources locally, prepares evidence-backed analytics and replies, and posts only after explicit confirmation.
defaultPrompt: Prepare a reply for a Telegram user.
Show the most active support chat users.
